Short CV

Begüm Çetin completed her Bachelor’s degree in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering at Eskişehir Osmangazi University between September 2012 and 2017; she received her Master’s degree in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Electrical Machines, at Eskişehir Technical University between September 2019 and January 2023. Her research interests include the uninterrupted and safe transmission and distribution of energy (grid automation), renewable energy, microgrids, smart grid systems, sustainability of power quality, artificial intelligence, neuroscience, engineering, and technology. She currently works as a Research Assistant in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English), Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Üsküdar University.
